data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior regarding group size changes after booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or behaviors related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports such changes. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior when group size changes after booking.
